# NYX Studio — Full Knowledge Base

> AI-native content and growth studio for B2B, B2C, D2C, and Real Estate brands
> selling in India. Based in Pune, Maharashtra. Co-founded by Atharv
> Paharia and Bhavya Jain.
>
> Site: https://www.nyxstudio.in
> Email: official.nyxstudio@gmail.com
> Slogan: We make brands impossible to scroll past.

## What NYX Studio does

NYX Studio is a content and growth studio for B2B, B2C, D2C, and Real Estate brands operating in India. We are AI-native — meaning every part of the production pipeline (script generation, AI voiceover, AI video synthesis, motion graphics, captioning, platform-specific resizing, scheduled distribution) is built around generative AI augmenting a small human creative team, rather than replacing it.

The studio sits at the intersection of three jobs that brands normally have to hire three different agencies for:

1. **Cinematic brand films and short-form content.** Reels, Stories, YouTube Shorts. Both live-shot and AI-generated. AI-generated product films are indistinguishable from a five-figure live shoot for roughly 70% of social-media use cases as of 2026, so we lean AI for speed and live for moments that demand a human on camera.

2. **Performance creative for paid ads.** Hooks, variants, A/B unit production for Meta (Facebook + Instagram) and Google. Tied directly to the brand-film output so the same creative system feeds organic and paid.

3. **Influencer operations.** Creator sourcing, brief writing, deliverable QA, post-publish reporting. Bundled into the Growth Pack only — we don't run influencer-only retainers.

## Who NYX Studio works with

- **Vertical focus:** Direct-to-Consumer (D2C), Business-to-Consumer (B2C), Business-to-Business (B2B), and Real Estate brands.
- **Geography:** India-first. We work with brands across the country. We also accept international brands selling into India or targeting the Indian consumer ecosystem.
- **Stage:** Roughly post-product-market-fit, typically content velocity becoming the bottleneck.

## Past partners & brand collaborators

- Dessertino — dessert / food D2C
- Habibs — hair & beauty / lifestyle
- Newton School — edtech / B2B & consumer tech
- And many more.

Case studies and brand films are at https://www.nyxstudio.in/work.

## Pricing — three packs

All packs are monthly retainers. India-priced (INR).

### Trial Pack — ₹30,000/month

- 15-17 high-fidelity posts and cinematic reels per month
- POV and hook explorations
- Premium photography
- 1 platform focus (typically Instagram)
- Deep analytics reporting

### Starter Pack — ₹50,000/month

- 20-25 dynamic reels and posts per month
- UGC sourcing
- Meta Ads engine (Facebook + Instagram performance creative)
- Hyper-local targeting
- Light influencer collabs

### Growth Pack — ₹80,000/month

- 30-40 dominant reels and posts per month
- Full-scale ecosystem execution
- Multi-tiered campaign funnels
- Full influencer operations (sourcing, briefs, QA, reporting)
- WhatsApp/SMS retention funnels
- Performance ops

One-off projects (brand films, launch campaigns) are accepted when scope is clearly defined, but we are retainer-first because content velocity is what actually moves metrics. One campaign a quarter doesn't compound; a reel a week does.

## Turnaround

- **Live-shot cinematic reel:** 5-7 business days from approved brief to final delivery.
- **AI-generated product film:** 48-72 hours when no live shoot is required.
- **Rush turnaround:** Available for existing partners.

## Founders

### Atharv Paharia — Co-Founder & Tech Lead

Leads AI engineering, the content production pipeline, and video automation systems. Background in building tooling that lets small creative teams ship at the velocity of much larger agencies.

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/atharv-paharia-468276272/

### Bhavya Jain — Co-Founder & Product Lead

Leads brand strategy, product, and the partner-facing systems that translate briefs into shipping content campaigns. Background in product and the Indian D2C ecosystem.

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/bhavya-jain-10963b33a/

## Onboarding

1. Send a brief via the contact page at https://www.nyxstudio.in/contact
2. Response within 48 hours with a fit assessment
3. If we're a fit, 20-minute scoping call
4. Pack proposal (Trial / Starter / Growth)
5. First 3 assets ship within 7 business days of kickoff

## Measurement

Per-asset:
- First-frame stop-rate
- 3-second view-through
- Completion rate
- Conversion-to-action

For paid creative:
- CPM, CTR, ROAS, frequency

Reports ship monthly via the partner portal at https://www.nyxstudio.in/portal.

## Platforms we publish to

- Instagram (Reels, Posts, Stories) — primary
- TikTok — short-form video
- YouTube Shorts — cross-posting
- Meta Ads (Facebook + Instagram) — paid creative
- WhatsApp/SMS — retention funnels, Growth Pack only
